description: FAOSTAT data for 245 countries: crops, trade, food security, and emissions via 21 MCP tools.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.berba-q/faostat-mcp

environmentVariables.description: FAOSTAT JWT access token. Obtain from the FAOSTAT Developer Portal. Optional if FAOSTAT_USERNAME and FAOSTAT_PASSWORD are provided.
environmentVariables.name: FAOSTAT_API_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: FAOSTAT account email. Used with FAOSTAT_PASSWORD for automatic token refresh. Optional if FAOSTAT_API_TOKEN is provided.
environmentVariables.name: FAOSTAT_USERNAME

environmentVariables.description: FAOSTAT account password. Used with FAOSTAT_USERNAME for token refresh.
environmentVariables.name: FAOSTAT_PASSWORD

title: FAOSTAT MCP
